visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, a patterned cap, and a light blue hoodie stands against a grey vertical-slat background. He gestures with his hands toward a floating yellow banana graphic with text overlays. The scene has a red and orange brand border at the top and bottom. (2) A real yellow banana is shown taped horizontally to a clean white wall using a single strip of silver industrial duct tape. The lighting is bright and flat, characteristic of a gallery setting. (3) A wide shot of a crowded auction house interior. Numerous people are seated in rows, many holding up smartphones to record. A man in a suit stands at a podium on a raised stage under bright studio lights. (4) A man with short black hair and a black shirt peels a yellow banana and takes a large bite while smiling. He is holding a black microphone in his other hand. (5) Another man in a grey shirt is shown in a different setting, also peeling and eating a banana. (6) The video cuts back to the initial man in the cap, who continues talking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. Large text overlays and colorful graphic pop-ups appear around him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思Tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 價值2億新台幣的香蕉你會吃嗎?! (2) [Subtitle]: 卡特蘭於2019年創造了一個. [Variety]: 香蕉用膠帶貼黏在牆壁上的一個概念的藝術作品. (3) [Subtitle]: 而該項的藝術作品近期在紐約一場拍賣會中. (4) [Subtitle]: 被一個加密貨幣創業家以620萬美元得標. (5) [Subtitle]: 而這個得標主在發表完得標感言以後便當眾就把那個香蕉剝開一口就把它吃下去了. (6) [Subtitle]: 他認為吃掉香蕉本身也是有創作的一部分. 不過其實他吃的這根香蕉並不是2019年首次展出的那根香蕉. (7) [Subtitle]: 他於拍賣會上購買這項作品是出自於卡特蘭之手的證書以及香蕉變質時要如何更換的一個說明書啦. [Slogan]: 你會想吃嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 1 primary subject (buyer), and a large crowd of auction attendees.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The host is a middle-aged male wearing a brown checkered flat cap, glasses, and a light blue Roots Athletics hoodie. The second character is a younger male with short black hair wearing a black business suit/shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video shifts between a controlled studio with vertical slat panels, a minimalist white art gallery wall, and a high-end auction room with tiered seating and professional podiums.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced male narration begins immediately with high energy. Upbeat, synthesized BGM with a strong electronic beat plays consistently. A bright 'pop' sound effect triggers as the first text graphic appears. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the narrator describes the 2019 artwork. The vocal tone is crisp and enunciated. (3) Background audio shifts to include a low crowd murmur from an auction house recording, layered under the continuous upbeat BGM and primary narration. (4) A second male voice (recording from the event) is heard briefly in the background, overlaid by the narrator's commentary. A 'ding' SFX sounds during a variety-style text pop-up. (5) The narrator's pitch rises slightly during a humorous revelation about eating the banana. The music maintains a constant 128 BPM energy. (6) Final phase features a conclusive, questioning vocal inflection from the narrator. A closing musical stinger coincides with the final brand slogan overlay.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Historical Context -> Current Event -> Climactic Action -> Explanation -> Closing Question.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about the viral news story regarding Maurizio Cattelan's expensive 'Comedian' banana art piece, specifically focusing on its recent auction for millions of dollars and the buyer's act of eating it to clarify what was actually purchased (the certificate and instructions).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Consistent presence of 'miko' brand logo and '3c有趣思Tim哥' social handles throughout the video framing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density 'variety show' editing style popular on social media, combining fast-paced narration, frequent text overlays, and sound effects to maintain high engagement.
